title: Verify clock- and reset-domain crossings
description: Run structural CDC and RDC analysis and add metastability and reset checks beyond functional simulation.
body: Use when a design has multiple clock or reset domains. Do not rely on functional simulation to catch crossing bugs, since metastability and reset glitches rarely appear in nominal simulation. Actions: run CDC and RDC structural analysis, confirm synchronizers on every crossing, and add metastability injection in simulation. Validation signals include a CDC report with no unsynchronized crossings and RDC analysis confirming clean reset crossings. Risk boundary: an unverified crossing causes intermittent field failures, so treat any flagged crossing as a blocking defect before tapeout.
